videos.title: Basic Classic Ski Techniques: Striding
videos.description:
The Missoula Nordic Ski Club demonstrates a basic technique of classic skiing:
Striding (or 'diagonal stride') - it's like a low gear for starting, easy skiing, and uphills

More technique videos
Overview of All Four Techniques: https://youtu.be/4aQVNyY52Pc
Striding: https://youtu.be/6NST1N6-P28
Herringbone: https://youtu.be/JdvUibe750k
Double Pole: https://youtu.be/BBa2fPziRl0
Kick Double Pole:  https://youtu.be/a7itYppe8xk
Grip: https://youtu.be/I8iGqr9ZZN0

Filmed at Lolo Pass on the Montana/Idaho border
videos.transcript:
there are four primary techniques or
gears in classic skiing and each is used
in different situations
this video is focused on the modern
techniques of classic skiing for use on
groomed trails we won't talk about
techniques for classic ski touring off
of groomed trails
classic striding sometimes called
diagonal stride is the traditional and
stereotypical classic technique striding
is like a low to medium gear in a car or
bike good for starting from a standstill
climbing up moderate hills or when the
snow is slow or deep
striding is powerful but is inefficient
at the higher speeds typical on gradual
uphills flats and downhills
striding is also used for easy relaxed
classic skiing on flat terrain and is
the first technique learned by beginners
in spite of this striding uphill is
deceptively difficult and requires
exquisite balance and excellent weight
transfer it's one of the hardest and
most subtle nordic ski techniques to
master skate or classic
when striding you push with one pole and
drive your body forward to glide on a
single ski bringing your opposite pole
forward at the same time left arm with
the right leg or right arm with left leg
the important thing is that your arm
swings forward in tandem with your body
driving forward
the forward motion of your body should
come from thrusting your hip and knee
forward while pressing downward with the
other foot
propulsion does not come from swinging
or kicking your leg and foot forward
when striding you're never standing with
weight on both skis you are fully
balanced and gliding forward on one ski
then drive your body forward onto the
other to glide and so on
it's easier to stride in
well-established classic tracks but
striding out of the tracks on a groomed
surface is excellent practice for
balance and weight transfer machine set
tracks are also often wider than is
comfortable for striding especially for
people of smaller stature it's totally
fine to stride outside of the tracks
getting good grip with your skis can be
difficult in icy tracks wet snow or on a
steep uphill if you start slipping first
increase the tempo at which you stride
and take shorter steps when even a fast
stride becomes too difficult consider
switching to a herringbone or running
herringbone technique which we'll cover
in a different video

videos.title: Finlandia Cross-Country Ski Marathon Set To Begin
videos.transcript:
if you're in the mood for skiing this
weekend the Finlandia ski marathon is
the thing to do the CrossCountry ski
Marathon welcomes both beginners and
expert skiers and consists of five races
skiers from all over the country are
expected to participate including Canada
for the spectator sport it can take
anywhere from 1 to three hours to
complete the race and participants go
around the course two to three times
this year three there will be some
changes to the
course we decided to Short in the course
this year um it's normally a 25k Loop um
and we've gone down to an 11 11k across
the road here or what we call the west
side of buav Vista Ski Area now due to
the warm weather the start times for the
race have been moved up by 1 hour and
will now begin at 9:00 a.m. if you've
enjoyed this segment of Lakeland news
please consider making a tax deductible
contribution to Lakeland Public
Television

videos.title: Trysil skimaraton - et populært turrenn
videos.description: Lørdag 16. februar er det duket for det 20. Trysil Skimaraton. Hvis værmeldingen slår til vil det bli rekordføre på lørdag. Det er forventet opp mot 600 deltakere til start til rennet, som har seeding både til Vasaloppet og Birken.

videos.title: BigUp Ski Marathon - bland kullar på slätten
videos.description:
Race report från 2026 års upplaga av BigUp Ski Marathon, ett långlopp på Vreta Ski Center. Filmen visar min upplevelse före, under och efter loppet, filmat med kameror fastsatta på mig som ger en Point-Of-View känsla. 

Loppet är seedningsgrundande för Vasaloppet och i år genomfördes det på konstsnöslinga som det kördes 13 varv på. Banan var mestadels relativt flack, men varvet innehöll också en backe på 20 hm som gjorde att STIFA för loppet likväl blev 13 (faktiskt mer än ett genomsnittligt seedningslopp i Sverige idag).

Innehåll: 
00:00 Intro innan start
2:51 Start, första varvet och bangenomgång
4:47 Varv 2-5
10:15 Halvvägs
12:23 Fyra varv kvar
15:20 Målgång
16:21 Vallagenomgång hos Snö och Tö
